feed.title: Chuan Zhang
feed.subtitle: Chuan Zhang's technical blog covering software engineering, machine learning, systems design, and more.

entry.title: Understanding Transformer Attention: From Dot Products to Self-Attention

link.title: Understanding Transformer Attention: From Dot Products to Self-Attention

entry.summary: The attention mechanism is the core building block of the Transformer architecture. This post builds it up from first principles so that the math and code land at the same time. The Problem Attention Solves In a sequence model, we want each token to “look at” other tokens and decide how much weight to give each one when producing its output. Early RNN approaches processed sequences step-by-st...

entry.title: Welcome to My Technical Blog
entry.summary: After publishing on Medium for a while, I’ve decided to move my technical writing to a self-hosted personal blog. This post is a quick note on why, and what to expect. Why Move Away from Medium? Medium is a great platform for reaching readers, but over time a few friction points added up: Paywalls — some readers couldn’t access my articles without a subscription No full control — format...
